practice.name: Problem 19 (2023 AMC 8)
practice.statement: An equilateral triangle is placed inside a larger equilateral triangle so that the region between them can be divided into three congruent trapezoids, as shown below. The ratio of the side length of the inner triangle to the side length of the outer triangle is $2:3$. What is the ratio of the area of one trapezoid to the area of the inner triangle?

practice.name: Problem 5 (2006 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Points $A$, $B$, $C$, and $D$ are midpoints of the sides of the larger square. If the larger square has area $60$, what is the area of the smaller square?
